plane_snapshot.status: 1 submission blocked, 0 parked tasks, 0 open dead letters

recommended_runs.why: Convert the blocking gate findings into a bounded builder packet before any code work.
Run the builder lane against the fix-prompt packet produced by the previous step.

stop_conditions: The submission is no longer blocked (a newer round cleared it).
A fix-prompt run for this submission and round already exists in the ledger.
Total recommended fan-out would exceed the task budget.
residual_risk: The plan assumes the fix-prompt packet path is FIX_PROMPT.json; the builder still inspects the diff and re-runs the submission gate.
